items.title: Weekly recap of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP ETF performance
items.whyYouShouldCare: The performance of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP ETFs can influence investor sentiment and liquidity across the crypto market, impacting SOL's positioning.

items.title: Justin Sun calls out WLFI, platform threatens lawsuit in response
items.whyYouShouldCare: Justin Sun's dispute with WLFI highlights potential legal risks in the crypto space, which could affect investor confidence in platforms associated with Solana.

items.title: Over 80% of Bitcoin ETF assets hit Coinbase custody choke point with $74B at risk
items.whyYouShouldCare: With over $74B in Bitcoin ETF assets at risk due to custody issues, this could lead to liquidity challenges that may ripple through the broader crypto ecosystem, including Solana.
